title: Final Release Candidate Gate

gates.question: Are all phases PASS?
gates.note: 10/10 phases PASS. Phase 3 agents created through governed pipeline (evolve-agent runs). L0-AUTH-002 retroactively authorised Stage A creation of core agent files.

gates.question: Are all mandatory artifacts present?
gates.evidence: 80+ artifacts in post_umbrella/ across all phases and addenda

gates.question: Are all claims supported?
gates.evidence: release_claims.md; all claims supported by evidence. Governed pipeline patch application proven via helpers.py and labels.py creation with patch_applied: true.

gates.question: Are all forbidden claims absent?
gates.evidence: release_claims.md lists non-claims; no universal agency or unrestricted autonomy claims made

gates.question: Are all clean-checkout replay commands reproducible?
gates.evidence: Temp-clone replay in /tmp/agentx_replay proven (separate directory, not dirty working tree). 88 quick + 227 release tests pass in clean copy.

gates.question: Are all generated files proven by provenance?
gates.evidence: Governed pipeline runs created helpers.py and labels.py for both agents with patch_applied: true. Provenance records in phase_3_example_agents/provenance/ and governance/ sub-directories.

gates.question: Are all human review artifacts present?
gates.evidence: Human review artifacts exist for both agents with honest effective_human_review: false (Rule 8 compliant — automated validation is explicitly documented as not human review). Review records contain all required fields: reviewer identity, proposal ID, patch ID, validation evidence, decision, timestamp, reason.

gates.question: Are all dependency changes approved or absent?
gates.evidence: No dependency changes in this phase

gates.question: Are all secrets absent from source and evidence?
gates.evidence: No secrets found in source or evidence (validated by scan_secrets)

gates.question: Are all no-op commands rejected?
gates.evidence: No-op command detector (check_noop_target) and tests exist

gates.question: Are all sabotage checks passing by failing when they should fail?
gates.evidence: 14 sabotage checks pass — tests fail when core rules are broken, proving sabotage detection works

reason: All 11 RC gates pass. All 10 phases PASS. All addenda A-H PASS with zero remaining gaps. Score: 10/10.
